tenYearTarget.text: $20,000/month net non-W-2 income — W-2 income optional by December 31, 2036
Home, shop, yard, and homestead complete and fully functional
Ranch profitable, regenerative, and simple enough to enjoy
Family OS actively guiding decisions, priorities, and alignment
Strong faith, strong marriage, and deep parent-child connection
Healthy margin in time, finances, emotions, and operations
Freer, calmer, wiser, healthier, and more present

threeYearVision.text: Target: December 31, 2028 — building calm, freedom, and stability without sacrificing family.
Calm structure replaces constant reaction mode
Home becomes the steady center for homeschooling, meals, routines, and connection
Marriage functions as a team — communicating earlier, resetting before chaos sets in
Kids deeply included and connected — older girls protected, Owen intentionally supported
Baby enters a stable, protected family rhythm from the start
Ranch easier to manage with better systems and lower friction
Financial momentum building steadily toward W-2 independence
